summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Facts Are Foes controversy app. Backend APIs fully functional with 27/27 tests passing. Frontend loads correctly with Egyptian space theme, all major features working including AI explanations, voting, and navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts pointer events preventing clicks on Submit button when auth modal is open

passed_tests: All 27 backend API endpoints working correctly
Homepage loads with Egyptian space theme (pyramid icons, floating stars)
Hero section displays correctly with title and subtitle
Categories section loads with 8 category cards
Featured facts section displays fact cards
Navigation between pages (Home, Explore, Fact Detail) works
Search functionality on Explore page works
Category filtering on Explore page works
Fact detail page loads with content sections
AI explanation generation works with Gemini 3 Flash
Seed data endpoint populates sample facts
User registration and login flow works

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor UI issue with modal overlay)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue in AuthModal component to prevent pointer event interception when clicking Submit button. This is a minor UX improvement.
